description: Global npm CLI package registry for required agent command-line tools that are not maintained through Brew or WinGet on every platform.

policy.dependencyPolicy: Do not list transitive npm dependencies.
policy.platformPolicy: Codex, Claude Code, and the standalone GitHub Copilot CLI use npm as the common fallback on macOS, Linux, and Windows when the command remains missing after package-manager maintenance. Google Antigravity is maintained through Brew on macOS, the verified official installer on Linux, and WinGet on Windows.
